What this test was checking
Core Web Vitals must all be within budget for a passing user experience. Logs all values so the team sees actuals even on pass — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
params: [homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)

Core Web Vitals must all be within budget for a passing user
